name: Caramel-Apple Sundae Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (8 ounces each) cream cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat margarine and sugar until light and fluffy. Blend in egg.
2. Add flour; mix well. Spread dough onto bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
3. Combine cream cheese, 1/3 cup sugar, and flour, mixing at medium speed until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in sour cream. Toss apples with remaining sugar and cinnamon. Stir into the cream cheese mixture.
4. Pour over crust. Swirl 1/4 cup caramel topping into the cream cheese mixture.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan. Chill. Top with remaining caramel topping and pecans.
